data.name: FutakinValley
data.detailed_description:
Futakin Valley is an action platformer-type game. Nene is a futanari girl who loves mushrooms, during her journey she falls into a valley. Nene's goal is to escape from there and reach her destination, the mushroom village.

You are a green haired elf and please help the villagers and liberate the village occupied by monsters.

Features:

- All the girls are futa.

- The villagers have their own problems, so please help them.

- Artworks are unlocked by defeating the monster girls.

- Costumes and special items are hidden in various locations.

Metroidvania's always more fun when you're a futanari nudist elf!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP/Vista/7/10
  • 處理器: Celeron 2GHz
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce GT 710
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0b
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:

  • 處理器: Pentium Dual-Core G4560
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce GT 1030
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0b
  • 儲存空間: 1000 MB 可用空間
